Holy joy is the heart and soul of praise, and that is here emphasized for the righteous. Thankful praise is the breath and language of holy joy. Religious songs are proper expressions of thankful praise. Every blessing we possess should be employed with all our skill and earnestness in God’s service. His promises are all wise and good. His word is right, and therefore we are only correct when we agree with it. His works are all done in truth. He is the righteous Lord, therefore loves righteousness. What a pity it is that this earth, which is so full of proofs and examples of God’s goodness, should be so empty of his praises; and that of the many who live upon his bounty, there are so few who live to his glory! What the Lord does, he does with purpose; it remains firm. He overrules all the plans of people, and makes them serve his plans; even that is fulfilled, which to us seems most surprising, the eternal plan of God, nor can anything prevent its coming to pass.

God knows all the motions and operations of people’s souls better than they do; no mortals know these things except themselves. God has their hearts and their times in his hand; he formed each person's spirit within them. All the powers of creation depend on him, and are useless without him. If we make God’s favor certain toward us, then we need not fear whatever is against us. We are to give to him the glory of his special grace. All human plans for the salvation of our souls are vain; but the Lord's watchful eye is over those whose conscientious fear of his name comes from a believing hope in his mercy. In difficulties they will be helped; in dangers they will not receive any real damage. Those who fear God and his wrath must hope in God and his mercy; for there is no escaping him, but by going to him. Let your mercy, O Lord, be upon us; let us always have the comfort and benefit, not according to our merits, but according to the promise which you have given to us in your word, and according to the faith you have worked in us through your Spirit and grace.
